course_title: TAXATION: CONCEPTS FOR BUSINESS AND PERSONAL PLANNING
description: An introduction to the U.S. income taxation concepts with emphasis on business and personal planning strategies. Taxes are placed in a framework which considers all costs of doing business. Includes approaches and skills needed to prepare individual, corporate, and partnership income tax returns.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ACCT I S 100,300, orLAW 811. Not open to students declared in Business: Accounting BBA program

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ACCT I S 100,300, orLAW 811. Not open to students declared in Business: Accounting BBA program
